summary.en: Qatar applies GSO electromagnetic-compatibility standards （which adopt the relevant IEC/CISPR EMC requirements） to motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies. The product must not produce excessive electromagnetic disturbance and must have adequate immunity, with EMC evidence forming part of the QGOSM conformity dossier for electrical and electronic products.
summary.zh: 卡塔尔对电机驱动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源适用 GSO 电磁兼容标准（其采纳相关 IEC/CISPR EMC 要求）。产品不得产生过量电磁骚扰，并应具备足够抗扰度，EMC 证据构成电气电子产品 QGOSM 符合性档案的一部分。
summary.zht: 卡塔爾對電機驅動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源適用 GSO 電磁相容標準（其採納相關 IEC/CISPR EMC 要求）。產品不得產生過量電磁騷擾，並應具備足夠抗擾度，EMC 證據構成電氣電子產品 QGOSM 符合性檔案的一部分。

standards_or_laws: GSO EMC standards adopting IEC/CISPR electromagnetic compatibility requirements
QGOSM conformity assessment for electrical and electronic products [national route]

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports under GB EMC standards alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and the mapping to GSO/IEC EMC limits still need Qatar-specific review.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含按 GB EMC 标准出具的 EMC 报告。测试限值、配置、最不利工况、是否包含充电器以及与 GSO/IEC EMC 限值的映射仍需按卡塔尔要求复核。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含按 GB EMC 標準出具的 EMC 報告。測試限值、配置、最不利工況、是否包含充電器以及與 GSO/IEC EMC 限值的映射仍需按卡塔爾要求覆核。

standards_or_laws: China GB EMC standards and test reports where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is a report that tests only the bare tool but omits the charger, battery pack, electronic controller variants, or worst-case load conditions. The Qatar dossier should show the exact marketed configuration and demonstrate that EMC results map to the GSO/IEC limits accepted by QGOSM.
gap.zh: 常见差距是报告只测试裸工具，而遗漏充电器、电池包、电子控制器变体或最不利负载条件。卡塔尔档案应显示实际销售配置，并证明 EMC 结果映射到 QGOSM 接受的 GSO/IEC 限值。
gap.zht: 常見差距是報告只測試裸工具，而遺漏充電器、電池包、電子控制器變體或最不利負載條件。卡塔爾檔案應顯示實際銷售配置，並證明 EMC 結果映射到 QGOSM 接受的 GSO/IEC 限值。

target.en: Mandatory in practice: EMC evidence is required within QGOSM conformity for in-scope electrical and electronic apparatus, assessed against GSO EMC standards adopting IEC/CISPR requirements.
target.zh: 实务强制：适用电气电子设备的 QGOSM 符合性内需要 EMC 证据，按采纳 IEC/CISPR 要求的 GSO EMC 标准评定。
target.zht: 實務強制：適用電氣電子設備的 QGOSM 符合性內需要 EMC 證據，按採納 IEC/CISPR 要求的 GSO EMC 標準評定。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence, but Qatar acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and mapping to GSO/IEC limits.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 EMC 证据，但卡塔尔接受性取决于范围、限值、配置及与 GSO/IEC 限值的映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 EMC 證據，但卡塔爾接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置及與 GSO/IEC 限值的映射。

source.publisher: Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM), Ministry of Commerce and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Qatar-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system and is shown to meet the GSO/IEC EMC limits accepted within QGOSM conformity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据覆盖实际销售的工具系统并证明满足 QGOSM 符合性内所接受的 GSO/IEC EMC 限值前，不能视为卡塔尔就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據覆蓋實際銷售的工具系統並證明滿足 QGOSM 符合性內所接受的 GSO/IEC EMC 限值前，不能視為卡塔爾就緒。
